name: kyoryokutai-backend
description: Backend for 協力隊クリアベース (regional revitalization team portal)

scripts.start:prod: echo 'RUN MIGRATE' && npx prisma migrate deploy && echo 'MIGRATE DONE' && if [ "$RUN_SEED" = "true" ]; then echo '=== RUN SEED ===' && npm run seed && echo 'SEED DONE'; fi && node dist/index.js
scripts.start:prod:push: echo 'FIX DB SCHEMA' && npx tsx scripts/fix-prod-db.ts && echo 'DB FIX DONE' && node dist/index.js
scripts.start:prod:baseline: echo 'BASELINE MIGRATE' && npx prisma migrate resolve --applied 20260403000000_add_government_attendance 2>/dev/null; npx prisma migrate resolve --applied 20260403000001_gov_attendance_add_time_enddate 2>/dev/null; npx prisma migrate resolve --applied 20260404000000_announcement_confirm_target 2>/dev/null; npx prisma migrate resolve --applied 20260405000000_schedule_custom_color 2>/dev/null; npx prisma migrate deploy && echo 'MIGRATE DONE' && node dist/index.js
scripts.start:prod:recover-p3009: echo 'RUN MIGRATE (recover: resolve failed email migration, then deploy)' && npx prisma migrate resolve --rolled-back 20260329000000_update_member_emails && npx prisma migrate deploy && echo 'MIGRATE DONE' && if [ "$RUN_SEED" = "true" ]; then echo '=== RUN SEED ===' && npm run seed && echo 'SEED DONE'; fi && node dist/index.js
scripts.start:prod:fix-timeadjustment: echo 'RESOLVE EXISTING MIGRATIONS' && npx prisma migrate resolve --applied 20260123000000_add_event_updated_by 2>/dev/null; npx prisma migrate resolve --applied 20260124000000_add_document_template 2>/dev/null; npx prisma migrate resolve --applied 20260125000000_add_display_order_to_user 2>/dev/null; npx prisma migrate resolve --applied 20260126000000_add_wish_model 2>/dev/null; npx prisma migrate resolve --applied 20260127000000_add_theme_color_to_project 2>/dev/null; npx prisma migrate resolve --applied 20260127000001_add_wishes_enabled_to_user 2>/dev/null; npx prisma migrate resolve --applied 20260128000000_add_due_date_to_task 2>/dev/null; npx prisma migrate resolve --applied 20260129000000_add_status_to_event_participation 2>/dev/null; npx prisma migrate resolve --applied 20260130000000_add_start_end_date_to_schedule 2>/dev/null; npx prisma migrate resolve --applied 20260131000000_add_title_to_schedule 2>/dev/null; npx prisma migrate resolve --applied 20260131000001_add_start_end_date_to_event 2>/dev/null; npx prisma migrate resolve --applied 20260325000000_consultation_member_role_task_link 2>/dev/null; npx prisma migrate resolve --applied 20260326000000_activity_expenses 2>/dev/null; npx prisma migrate resolve --applied 20260327000000_announcements 2>/dev/null; npx prisma migrate resolve --applied 20260328000000_mandated_events_triage_schedule_event 2>/dev/null; npx prisma migrate resolve --applied 20260328103000_sns_follower_mandated_audit 2>/dev/null; npx prisma migrate resolve --applied 20260328140000_user_password_master_plain 2>/dev/null; npx prisma migrate resolve --applied 20260328160000_ukishima_government_role 2>/dev/null; npx prisma migrate resolve --applied 20260329000000_update_member_emails 2>/dev/null; npx prisma migrate resolve --applied 20260331120000_clearbase_sns_wishes_activity_expense 2>/dev/null; npx prisma migrate resolve --applied 20260403000000_add_government_attendance 2>/dev/null; npx prisma migrate resolve --applied 20260403000001_gov_attendance_add_time_enddate 2>/dev/null; npx prisma migrate resolve --applied 20260404000000_announcement_confirm_target 2>/dev/null; npx prisma migrate resolve --applied 20260405000000_schedule_custom_color 2>/dev/null; npx prisma migrate resolve --applied 20260406000000_sns_account 2>/dev/null; npx prisma migrate resolve --applied 20260407000000_add_project_achieved_contacts 2>/dev/null; npx prisma migrate resolve --applied 20260408000000_add_notepad 2>/dev/null; echo 'DEPLOY NEW MIGRATION' && npx prisma migrate deploy && echo 'MIGRATE DONE' && node dist/index.js
